description_long: This handbag features an ornate, sculpted design resembling a cluster of grapes surrounded by large, detailed vine leaves. The body is crafted to mimic the organic forms of grapevines, with a prominent, rounded handle at the top that appears integrated into the leafy motif. The surface is textured and matte, with intricate cutouts and relief work that give it a decorative, almost antique appearance. The color is a uniform, aged ivory or beige, enhancing its vintage or classical aesthetic. The handbag is relatively small, with a narrow profile when viewed from the side, and appears to be made from a hard, ceramic-like material. There are no visible fasteners, closures, or brand markings, and the interior is partially visible through the openwork design.
description: An ornate, ivory-toned handbag sculpted to resemble grape clusters and vine leaves, with a rounded integrated handle and a textured, decorative surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the detailed grape cluster and leaf motif, with the handle arching above and intricate cutouts visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the narrow profile and the open, hollow interior, emphasizing the thickness of the sculpted sides.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same grape and leaf design, with the handle and cutouts clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the slim, open structure and the sculpted, textured edges.
attribute_strap_type: single, short, rigid handle integrated into the top, non-adjustable, sculpted as part of the body
attribute_closure_mechanism: none visible; open top with no apparent closure mechanism
attribute_decorative_elements: sculpted grape cluster and vine leaves forming the entire exterior; no additional hardware or embellishments
attribute_pattern: sculpted grape and leaf motif; no printed or painted pattern
